parsed.evidence: Icing of the pitot tube causes the airspeed sensor to freeze at a constant value regardless of actual speed.
parsed.reasoning: The symptom of telemetry link dropping at ranges over 500 meters suggests an issue with the radio transmission, rather than antenna blocking or range limitations.
